title: ligusticopsis likiangensis
intro: Ligusticopsis likiangensis, also known as Sichuan ligusticum, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties. Ligusticopsis likiangensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine.
